working_on.task: Even distribution of siblings + resizable cards
working_on.notes: Layout engine now re-centers parents over children midpoint (bottom-up post-process) and evenly distributes siblings with shiftSubtree helper

pending_tasks.task: Test even distribution with larger trees (more generations)
pending_tasks.notes: Current fix works for 4 generations, need to verify with deeper trees

pending_tasks.task: Check for overlapping cards when subtrees are redistributed
pending_tasks.notes: Even redistribution might cause descendant overlap in edge cases

recent_changes.description: Generation-specific colors: red->orange->yellow-white->green->blue gradient matching traditional Vietnamese gia pha
Resizable cards: drag handle on hover, text auto-scales, sizes persist to localStorage (key: tree-card-sizes)
Layout engine uses custom card sizes (getW/getH helpers) in computeSubtreeWidth, assignPositions, and connection calculations
Added 'Reset o' button to toolbar - appears when cards have been resized, clears localStorage and resets all card sizes
Removed 'Doi X' generation badge from inside cards (info already shown in sidebar labels)
Post-process: re-center parents over children midpoint (bottom-up). shiftSubtree helper recursively shifts person + all descendants + spouses
Even distribution: after initial layout, redistribute sibling centers evenly within their span, then center parent. Eliminates visual 1-3 grouping

decisions_made.decision: Use post-processing pass (not modify core algorithm) for centering and redistribution
decisions_made.reason: Core algorithm (computeSubtreeWidth + assignPositions) handles space allocation. Post-process adjusts visual positions without risking overlap.

decisions_made.decision: Process bottom-up (deepest generation first) in post-processing
decisions_made.reason: When re-centering parent, children must already be in their final positions. Top-down processing gave incorrect results.

decisions_made.decision: shiftSubtree recursively shifts person + descendants + spouses
decisions_made.reason: When redistributing siblings evenly, moving a person must also move their entire subtree to maintain tree integrity.
User requested cleaner cards. Generation info is already visible in sidebar labels (Doi 1, Doi 2...).

decisions_made.decision: Card sizes persist to localStorage under key 'tree-card-sizes'
decisions_made.reason: User resizes cards for custom layout, should survive page reloads. Reset button provided to clear.
